description_long: This is a pair of locking pliers, commonly known as Vise-Grips, featuring a robust metallic construction with a matte black finish. The tool has two curved handles, one of which incorporates an adjustment screw at the end for setting the jaw width and clamping force. The jaws are rounded and serrated, designed to grip objects securely, and are connected by a visible pivot mechanism that allows the handles to move and lock in place. The lower handle includes a release lever for disengaging the locking mechanism. The surface of the handles appears smooth with some minor wear, and the overall build suggests durability for heavy-duty gripping tasks. No visible branding or logo is present on the exterior.
description: A sturdy pair of black locking pliers with curved handles, serrated jaws, and an adjustment screw for clamping force. The tool features a smooth metallic finish and a release lever for unlocking.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the adjustment screw and the narrow profile of the handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the pliers, the curved handles, adjustment screw, and the serrated jaws.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the rounded, serrated jaws and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the release lever, adjustment screw, and the overall shape of the pliers.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, smooth metallic handles with an integrated adjustment screw; not insulated or ergonomic.
attribute_jaw_design: Rounded, serrated jaws designed for strong gripping; lacks wire cutter or additional notches.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot with locking mechanism and adjustable jaw width via rear screw.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth metallic surface with no visible ribbing or knurling.
